info.name: SaaS Dashboard API
info.description:
# SaaS Dashboard API

Complete API collection for the SaaS multi-tenant dashboard and website.

## Authentication
Login via `POST /api/admin/auth/login` (landlord) or `POST /api/auth/login` (tenant). Token auto-saved to `{{token}}`.

## Route Groups
- **Admin (Landlord)**: `/api/admin/*` — `auth:api` + `landlord_roles`
- **Tenant**: `/api/tenant/*` — `auth:api` + `tenant_roles`
- **Module API**: `/api/v1/*` — `auth:api` or `auth:sanctum`
- **Website**: `/api/*` — public or `auth:sanctum`

## Base URLs
- `{{base_url}}` → `http://localhost:8000/api`
- `{{admin_base_url}}` → `http://localhost:8000/api/admin`
- `{{tenant_base_url}}` → `http://localhost:8000/api/tenant`
- `{{website_base_url}}` → `http://localhost:8000/api`

item.name: SaaS Website
item.description: Public-facing website API — Registration, Contact, Devices, Static Pages.

item.name: Registration
item.description: User registration, email verification, status checking. All public.

item.name: Contact
item.description: Contact form submissions and management. Store=public, others=auth:sanctum.

item.name: Devices
item.description: Device registration and tracking. Register/heartbeat=public, others=auth:sanctum.

item.name: Static Pages (Website)
item.description: Static pages for the public website.

item.name: SaaS Dashboard
item.description: Multi-tenant dashboard API — Admin (Landlord), Tenant, and Module routes.

item.name: Admin Auth
item.description: Admin authentication — login, 2FA, password reset. Public routes need no token.

exec: const d = pm.response.json(); if(d.user) pm.environment.set('user_id', d.user.id);

item.name: Tenant Auth & Profile
item.description: Tenant authentication, profile, sessions, and dashboard. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Admin Dashboard
item.description: Super admin dashboard data. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: User Management
item.description: CRUD + role assignment for users. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: Roles & Permissions
item.description: Role and permission management. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: Security
item.description: Security monitoring — login attempts and activity logs. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: Settings
item.description: System settings management. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: Email
item.description: Email campaigns, templates, SMTP, recipients, groups, subscribers, logs, compose. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: Utilities
item.description: Categories, tags, types, industries, currencies, units, announcements, static pages, releases, modules. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "System Maintenance",
  "content": "The system will undergo maintenance on May 1st from 2-4 AM UTC.",
  "type": "warning",
  "is_active": true,
  "starts_at": "2026-04-28T00:00:00Z",
  "ends_at": "2026-05-01T04:00:00Z"
}

item.name: Development
item.description: Development tools — system status, configs, backups, feature flags, IP blacklists, code builder, monitoring. Requires auth:api + landlord_roles.

item.name: File Manager
item.description: Media upload (single/bulk), document management (CRUD + download + versions + bulk delete), and folder management. All routes require auth:api. Media supports photos, videos, documents with validation (mime type, extension, size). Supports local and AWS S3 storage.

item.name: Media
item.description: Media-centric API — upload single/bulk files (photos, videos, documents), get media by ID, delete. Validates mime types, extensions, and size limits. Supports AWS S3 and local storage with public/private access levels.

formdata.description: File to upload (photo, video, or document). Max: photo=10MB, video=50MB, doc=20MB
Optional folder ID to organize the file

response.name: Error - Validation Failed
Error - Unsupported File Type
Error - File Too Large

formdata.description: Array of files (max 10). Each: photo≤10MB, video≤50MB, doc≤20MB

item.name: Documents
item.description: Document management — list, upload, show, update, delete, download, version history, bulk delete. Supports folder organization and access levels.

response.name: Error - Forbidden (Private File)

item.name: Folders
item.description: Folder management for organizing documents and media. Supports nested folders with parent/child relationships.

response.name: Success - Folders List
Success - Folder Created
Success - Folder Found
